exact_sentence: We built reporting that brought sales and stock data into one management view instead of being spread across separate spreadsheets and systems.
That made weekly trading conversations faster because the team was working from one version of the numbers.
The work replaced spreadsheet-heavy reporting with a cleaner view for commercial and operational teams.
We built a Power BI reporting suite that gave the leadership team a clearer view across operational and commercial performance.
That reduced the manual reporting burden and made regular decision-making faster.
The reporting setup replaced spreadsheet-heavy reporting with a cleaner management view.
We rebuilt the CRM structure so the pipeline, core fields and reporting worked properly together instead of being patched around old process.
That made the CRM easier for the team to keep up to date and more useful for management reporting.
The main gain was not just cleaner data, but a setup people could actually use without workarounds.
We automated a set of internal handoffs that had previously relied on people chasing updates across inboxes and spreadsheets.
That cut down avoidable admin and made the process easier to track from start to finish.
The work focused on practical automation rather than a big platform project.
We built a reporting layer that brought marketing performance into one place instead of being rebuilt manually every week.
That gave the team a faster read on what was working without spending so much time assembling the numbers.
The improvement came from cleaner structure and more usable reporting, not just more charts.
We helped structure comment and feedback data so recurring issues and themes were easier to review at scale.
